title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Retail

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Retail
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Visual Merchandiser at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Reliance Retail:
Reliance Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Retail!
